title: SlashTopics Lattice Query Adapter Contract v0.1
description: Normative contract for the slash-topic-query adapter used in Lattice FederatedQueryPlane routing. Governs topic-scoped query routing, policy membrane enforcement, deterministic receipt emission, and scoped search execution.

adapterKind.description: Identifies this object as a Slash Topics query adapter request. Must match the Lattice FederatedQueryPlane backend identifier.

adapterVersion.description: Adapter contract version. Lattice routes must reject adapters whose version they do not recognise.

latticeBackend.description: Binding to the Lattice FederatedQueryPlane backend descriptor.

plane.description: The Lattice plane this adapter targets.

backendId.description: Lattice canonical backend identifier for Slash Topics.

routeRef.description: Content-addressed reference (e.g. blake3 hash) or symbolic name of the Lattice route policy bundle that authorised this routing decision.

topicScope.description: Scoping constraints derived from slash topic routing. Exactly one of topicSlugs or topicPackRef must be provided.

topicSlugs.description: Ordered list of slash topic slugs that scope the query (e.g. ["/science", "/reference"]).

topicPackRef.description: Optional reference to a signed topic pack whose topic set defines the scope. When present, topicSlugs must be a subset of or equal to the pack's topic list.

topicPackDigest.description: Content hash of the referenced topic pack (e.g. blake3:…). Required when topicPackRef is provided.

policyMembrane.description: Policy membrane requirements that must be satisfied before topic packs are read or search is executed.

membraneRef.description: Content-addressed reference to the membrane policy bundle governing this query.

requiredDecision.description: The membrane decision that must be obtained before proceeding. DENY and QUARANTINE halt the pipeline immediately.

policyTags.description: Optional policy tags propagated from the upstream query request.

deterministicReceipt.description: Requirements for the deterministic receipt that must be emitted by every governed execution path.

mustEmit.description: Every non-dry-run execution MUST emit a receipt. This field is normatively true.

requiredFields.description: Ordered list of fields that the emitted receipt MUST include.

canonicalization.description: Canonicalization rules applied when hashing the receipt for signing.

bounded_nondeterminism.description: When true, the receipt must include rng_seed so that bounded nondeterminism is bounded and reproducible. Defaults to false (fully deterministic).

provenance.description: Provenance tracking requirements for replay and audit.

replayable.description: When true, the adapter guarantees that a future run with identical inputs, topic pack, and policy yields an equivalent result set (or a declared degradation receipt).

provenanceRef.description: URI or content-addressed reference pointing to the provenance record for this query execution.

localityClass.description: Locality class of the topic packs used in this query, used for working-set and movement-cost analysis.

packLoadEvents.description: Event log entries for topic pack selection and fetch, emitted as part of provenance.

scopedSearch.description: Scoped search execution requirements. In dry-run mode this block is validated but no search is executed.

queryRef.description: Content-addressed reference to the QueryRequest object that initiated this adapter invocation.

resultSetSchema.description: Schema identifier that the result set MUST conform to (e.g. search.resultset.schema.v0.1).

maxHits.description: Optional maximum number of result hits to return.

constraints.description: Optional search constraints forwarded from the upstream QueryRequest.

dryRun.description: Dry-run configuration. When present, the adapter validates route and policy WITHOUT reading topic packs or executing search.

enabled.description: When true, the adapter operates in dry-run mode.

validateRoute.description: Validate that the latticeBackend routeRef resolves to a known, authorised route.

validatePolicy.description: Validate that the policyMembrane membraneRef resolves and that the required decision would be reachable.

noPackRead.description: Normatively true in dry-run: topic packs are never read. Conforming implementations MUST NOT fetch pack bytes during dry-run.

noSearchExecute.description: Normatively true in dry-run: search is never executed. Conforming implementations MUST NOT issue search queries during dry-run.
